creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to mikael.urankar from comment #9)
The PORT_LLVM option was removed for a good reason. Rust not only uses a forked LLVM with a few commits that will probably never see upstream, but they almost always track llvm-devel. There is sentiment against too many ports depending on different LLVM versions.

We can't build just x86, even when aarch64 is broken right now.
